title: Zweihander
description: Vanila+ combat expansion mod with PVP focus. Are u pro yet?
body:
# ⚔️ Zweihander ⚔️

Combat expansion mod made to perfectly fit in with vanila Minecraft.

## Current features:
Zweihander, a heavy melee weapon with focus on range that has a unique set of enchantments and a staggering PvP utility. Legend never dies!
Infusions, powerful consumables that can spice up your combat choices by adding various effects to your melee weapons.
Repulsion enchantment for shields, to send your foes far away
### This mod supports Enchantment Description

_This mod is in active development and you can affect its updates and pitch ideas for it in my Discord server: https://discord.gg/V5VVZhrMDY_
